keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY NAUSEA. Nausea : Aeth., Ant-c., Ant-t., Ars., Bry., Carb-v., Cham., Cocc., Colch., Cup., Dig., Hep., Ign., Ip., Lyc., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Sul., Ver-a. Nausea, continuous : Ip., Iris., Nux-v., Sil. Nausea, deathly , anxious : Ant-t. Nausea, morning : Cimi., Nux-v., Pul., Sep. Nausea, odors (cooking, etc.), agg. : Ars., Cocc., Colch., Dig., Ip., Merc-i-f., Sep., Stan. Nausea, stomach , felt in : Ver-a. Nausea, throat , in : Cycl., Pho-ac., Stan., Val.
